phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si ordina la focaccia, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-veh see OR-dee-na la fo-KAT-cha, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Direttamente al banco, davanti a voi.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-reht-tah-MEHN-teh AHL BAHN-koh dah-VAHN-tee AH VOH-ee
likely_response.translation_en: Directly at the counter, in front of you.

responses.english: Directly at the counter, in front of you.
responses.phonetic: dee-reht-tah-MEHN-teh AHL BAHN-koh dah-VAHN-tee AH VOH-ee
responses.local: Direttamente al banco, davanti a voi.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, a che ora chiudete oggi, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, ah keh OH-ra kyoo-DEH-teh OD-jee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At fifteen, then we reopen evening.

responses.english: At fifteen, then we reopen evening.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa un etto di focaccia, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-ta oon ET-toh di fo-KAT-cha, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the price list.

responses.english: It is indicated on the price list.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, posso avere la focaccia da asporto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, POS-soh ah-VEH-reh la fo-KAT-cha da as-POR-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, just ask at the counter.

responses.english: Yes, just ask at the counter.
